stories.headline: Are Xi and Putin still ‘best friends’? – The Latest
stories.summary: Xi Jinping welcomed Vladimir Putin to Beijing with pomp and pageantry, just days after hosting Donald Trump. But as Russia’s war in Ukraine makes Moscow increasingly dependent on China, and western leaders thaw relations with Beijing, what does the power imbalance mean for Xi and Putin’s relationship? Lucy Hough speaks to the Guardian’s deputy head of international news, Devika Bhat Continue reading...

stories.headline: Same but different: how Xi and China welcomed Trump and Putin

stories.headline: Scion Group & Ares Management Team Up to Buy $910M in Student Housing
stories.summary: Scion Group CEO Rob Bronstein said that his team is targeting real estate around universities that represent a 'strong return on investment' in terms of tuition, as his company announces a deal with Ares Management to but  $910M in student housing properties. Bronstein, joined by Bloomberg's Norah Mulinda, said that his investment is aimed at providing a wide net of locations and price points in the student housing market.  (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: SEC Chief Atkins Pumps the Brakes on Prediction-Market Funds

stories.headline: US Seeks to Boost Energy Exports to India as Rubio Visits Delhi

stories.headline: NextEra to Buy Dominion for $67B to Form Power Giant
stories.summary: Bloomberg's David Carnevali joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." NextEra Energy agreed to pay about $67 billion in stock for Dominion Energy in the biggest power acquisition ever, creating a giant utility extending from Florida to the artificial intelligence data centers clustered in Virginia. (Source: Bloomberg)
